name: Common Sense
description: Once per chapter, the Storyteller may warn you away from a disastrous course of action with a Wits + Composure roll.

name: Danger Sense
description: +2 to reflexive Wits + Composure rolls to detect an impending ambush.

name: Eidetic Memory
description: Near-photographic memory; +2 to Intelligence + Composure rolls to recall details under stress.

name: Encyclopedic Knowledge
description: Roll Intelligence + Wits to recall factoids on nearly any topic. On a dramatic failure, you 'remember' something false.

name: Holistic Awareness
description: Treat illness and non-aggravated injuries with natural medicine (Intelligence + Medicine) once per day.

name: Language
description: One additional language. 1 dot: basic; 2 dots: conversational; 3 dots: native speaker. Purchase separately per language.

name: Meditative Mind
description: Enter meditation effortlessly; ignore all environmental penalties to Wits + Composure meditation rolls.

name: Unseen Sense
description: A 'sixth sense' that reacts to a specific type of supernatural creature or phenomenon chosen at purchase.

name: Ambidextrous
description: No –2 penalty for off-hand actions in combat or otherwise.

name: Brawling Dodge
description: When dodging, add Brawl dots to Defense instead of doubling it. Works against Brawl and Weaponry attacks.

name: Direction Sense
description: Innate sense of direction; always know compass bearings and can perfectly retrace your steps.

name: Disarm
description: On a successful Weaponry attack exceeding the opponent's Dexterity, their weapon lands nearby rather than dealing damage.

name: Fast Reflexes
description: +1 Initiative per dot.

name: Fighting Finesse
description: Use Dexterity instead of Strength on attack rolls with one chosen weapon. May be purchased multiple times for different weapons.

name: Fighting Style: Boxing
description: Progressive boxing maneuvers. ●Body Blow ●●Duck and Weave ●●●Combination Blows ●●●●Haymaker ●●●●●Brutal Blow.

name: Fighting Style: Kung Fu
description: Progressive Kung Fu maneuvers. ●Focused Attack ●●Iron Skin ●●●Defensive Attack ●●●●Whirlwind Strike ●●●●●Lethal Strike.

name: Fighting Style: Two Weapons
description: Fight with a weapon in each hand. ●Whirling Blades ●●Deflect and Thrust ●●●Focused Attack ●●●●Fluid Attack.

name: Fleet of Foot
description: +1 Speed per dot regardless of build.

name: Fresh Start
description: Spend an action to change your Initiative ranking; insert yourself at a new point in the roster for all subsequent turns.

name: Giant
description: Seven or more feet tall and over 250 lbs. +1 Size, +1 Health. Drawback: clothes and transport may cost more.

name: Gunslinger
description: Fire two pistols as a single action; off-hand still at –2, second target at –1. Pistols only.

name: Iron Stamina
description: Each dot eliminates one die penalty from fatigue or wounds on a one-for-one basis.

name: Iron Stomach
description: Eat almost anything without ill effect; +2 dice to Stamina rolls against deprivation.

name: Natural Immunity
description: +2 to Stamina rolls to resist infection, sickness, and disease.

name: Quick Draw
description: Draw and fire a pistol or draw and attack with a melee weapon as a single action without losing Defense.

name: Quick Healer
description: Heal at twice normal speed: bashing in 8 min, lethal in 1 day, aggravated in 4 days.

name: Strong Back
description: +1 die to actions involving lifting or carrying heavy weights.

name: Strong Lungs
description: Add 2 to Stamina when consulting the Holding Breath chart; can hold breath far longer than normal.

name: Stunt Driver
description: Perform an unrelated action (fire a weapon, punch a passenger) while driving without penalty.

name: Toxin Resistance
description: +2 to Stamina rolls against drugs, poisons, and toxins. Drawback: painkillers and anesthetics are only half effective.

name: Weaponry Dodge
description: When dodging, add Weaponry dots to Defense instead of doubling it. Works against Brawl and Weaponry attacks.

name: Allies
description: A group willing to help with favors. Each purchase covers one type of organization (police, criminals, unions). May be purchased multiple times.

name: Barfly
description: Always gain entry to any nightspot or bar with a few quick words and a modest bribe.

name: Contacts
description: Information sources in one sphere per purchase (reporters, street criminals, hackers, etc.). May be purchased multiple times.

name: Fame
description: +1 per dot to Socialize/Persuasion rolls with those who recognize you. Drawback: harder to remain unnoticed in public.

name: Inspiring
description: Once per session, a successful Presence + Persuasion roll lets all nearby allies regain all spent Willpower points.

name: Mentor
description: A knowledgeable teacher who provides guidance and advice. More dots = broader experience, influence, and resources.

name: Resources
description: Disposable income and assets. ●=$500/mo ●●=$1k/mo ●●●=$2k/mo ●●●●=$10k/mo ●●●●●=$50k/mo.

name: Retainer
description: A loyal servant or aide who performs tasks reliably. Dots indicate capability and skill level.

name: Status
description: Authority and standing within a specific organization (police, church, syndicate). Each purchase covers one group.

name: Striking Looks
description: Exceptionally attractive. ●●: +1 to Presence/Manipulation rolls using looks. ●●●●: +2. Note: comes in 2 or 4 dot versions only.
